reason: Code quality standards, forbidden patterns, testing requirements
Verify error handling follows spec: connector errors retry, tool errors throw, reasoning partial failure
Verify events are emitted correctly, no console.log in production paths
TUI quality: visual consistency, terminal compatibility, no hardcoded ANSI
Verify no any types, no type assertions, TypeBox schemas match implementation
Verify cross-layer contracts: tools → connectors → cache boundaries respected
Verify no duplicate code, no reinvented wheels
Verify design choices exploit agent attention bandwidth, no chat-wrappers, multi-step reasoning preserved
Verify implementation matches requirements and acceptance criteria
Verify implementation matches technical design: architecture layers, component contracts
